nasb.text: There was a barrier wall one cubit wide in front of the guardrooms on each side; and the guardrooms were six cubits square on each side.

esv.text: There was a barrier before the side rooms, one cubit on either side. And the side rooms were six cubits on either side.

cnv.text: 每個守衛室前面都有矮牆，高五十公分，兩邊守衛室都是一樣。守衛室長三公尺，兩邊都是一樣。

ccb.text: 两边守卫室前面的矮墙高五十厘米，守卫室都是三米宽的正方形。
